# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: my-app-namespace
  annotations:
    # This annotation enables automatic Linkerd proxy injection for all pods deployed in this namespace.
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-api-server
  namespace: my-app-namespace
spec:
  # The port your application's service (e.g., an API endpoint) listens on.
  # This Linkerd Server resource will define policies for connections targeting this port.
  port: 8080
  selector:
    # This selector matches the pods that run your 'my-api' application.
    # Ensure your Deployment/StatefulSet for 'my-api' has these labels.
    matchLabels:
      app: my-api
      version: v1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-internal-clients
  namespace: my-app-namespace
spec:
  # This AuthorizationPolicy targets the 'my-api-server' Linkerd Server defined above.
  # All connection attempts to 'my-api-server' will be evaluated against this policy.
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: my-api-server
  requiredAuthentication:
    # 'meshTLS' defines authentication requirements for clients within the Linkerd mesh.
    meshTLS:
      # Set to 'false' to require clients to present a valid Linkerd mTLS identity.
      # If 'true', unauthenticated mesh clients would be allowed, which typically isn't desired for security.
      unauthenticatedAllowed: false
    # This list specifies which client service accounts are authorized to connect.
    # Only clients running with 'my-internal-client-sa' or 'another-internal-client-sa'
    # service accounts in 'my-app-namespace' will be allowed to connect to 'my-api-server'.
    serviceAccountRefs:
      - name: my-internal-client-sa
      - name: another-internal-client-sa
